news.title: France vs England – Predicted lineup and team news
news.lede: France face England at Miami Stadium on Saturday evening in the World Cup third-place play-off, Didier Deschamps’ final match as manager after 14 years in charge. Deschamps announced before the tournament that this World Cup would be his last as France manager. The 2–0 defeat to Spain was not the ending he wanted. A win here at least delivers a bronze medal — France’s third World Cup podium finish — and the chance to send Deschamps out with a victory.

news.title: FIFA to investigate Argentina over ‘Malvinas’ flag in World Cup celebrations
news.lede: FIFA is considering whether to take disciplinary action against Argentina after some of their players celebrated their World Cup semi-final victory over England with a flag carrying a political message about the Falkland Islands, The Standard reports. The reigning champions came from behind to beat England 2-1 late in the game, booking their place in the World Cup final where they will face Spain. However, their post-match celebrations caught the eye, and they could be punished for it. Several Argentina players were seen posing with a flag reading “Las Malvinas son Argentinas,” which translates to “The Falklands are Argentinian.”

news.title: Tuchel defiant in face of criticism over decisions in England exit: ‘I have no regrets’
news.lede: Head coach refuses to engage in ‘blame game’ after defeat by Argentina. Trump joins critics of Tuchel’s tactics in World Cup semi-final elimination. Thomas Tuchel has insisted he is not interested in engaging in the “blame game” over England’s World Cup elimination and vowed to close the gap on the leading nations. Even Donald Trump has joined criticism of Tuchel’s tactics in the semi-final defeat by Argentina, with the US president questioning why he made Harry Kane “a defensive player” as England attempted to hold on to a 1-0 lead.

news.lede: England face France in a third-place playoff on Saturday, shortly after suffering a late semifinal defeat to Argentina.
